zh.lifeSummary: 當Godfrey Coney於1420年出生時，他的父親Anthony Coney45歲，母親Agnes Friskeny50歲。他於大約1442年與Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike在英國林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是9個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1466年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾吉爾頓享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Godfrey Coney于1420年出生时，他的父亲Anthony Coney45岁，母亲Agnes Friskeny50岁。他于大约1442年与Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike在英国林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是9个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1466年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾吉爾頓享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Coney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the vocabulary word (Old English huneg). Honey was used throughout the Middle Ages in Europe as a sweetener; sugar was not introduced to Europe from the New World until the 16th century. The word has long been used as a term of endearment. Modern use as a given name was prompted by a character in Margaret Mitchell's novel Gone with the Wind ( 1936 ), made into a film in 1939 .

en.lifeSummary: When Godfrey Coney was born in 1420, his father, Anthony Coney, was 45 and his mother, Agnes Friskeny, was 50. He married Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike about 1442, in Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons. He died about 1466, in Kirton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Godfrey Coney est né en 1420, son père, Anthony Coney, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Agnes Friskeny, avait 50 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike environ 1442, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils. Il est décédé environ 1466, à Kirton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Godfrey Coney 1420 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Anthony Coney 45 und seine Mutter Agnes Friskeny 50. Er hat um 1442 in Lincolnshire, England Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne. Er starb um 1466 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Kirton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Godfrey Coney è nato il nel 1420, il suo padre, Anthony Coney, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Friskeny, aveva 50 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike circa 1442, nel Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli. Morì circa 1466, nel Kirton, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Godfrey Coneyが1420年に生まれた時，父Anthony Coneyは45歳，母Agnes Friskenyは50歳であった。約1442年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでElizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledikeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子の親であった。彼は約1466年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアキルトンで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Godfrey Coney(이)가 1420년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Anthony Coney(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Friskeny(은)는 50세였다. 그는 대략 1442년 영국 링코실르에서 Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1466년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 커턴에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Godfrey Coney nasceu em 1420, seu pai, Anthony Coney, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Friskeny, tinha 50 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike aproximadamente 1442, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1466, em Kirton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Godfrey Coney родился в 1420 г., его отцу по имени Anthony Coney было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Friskeny, 50. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike около 1442 г. в местности линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей. Он умер около 1466 г. в местности киртон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Godfrey Coney nació en 1420, su papá, Anthony Coney, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Agnes Friskeny, tenía 50 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike aproximadamente 1442, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1466, en Kirton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 47 años.
